description:
GIVEN the user is watching a Live game
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates down and the scrubber comes into focus
steps.result:
THEN the user will hear "<away_team> @ <home_team>, Press Select to Pause, Press Up for Quick Actions, Press Down for More Options, Press Back to dismiss controls."

For example: "Dodgers @ Yankees, Press Select to Pause, Press Up for Quick Actions, Press down for More Options, Press Back to dismiss controls"
